title: T-036 — POST /api/production/downtime-events (manual entry by Shift Lead)
prompt:
# T-036 — POST /downtime-events (manual)

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.4 FR-08-E4-002, §8.2.5

## Goal
Implement POST /api/production/downtime-events for Shift Lead manual entry (not WO-PAUSE-linked) creating downtime_events row source='manual'.

## Implementation contract
App Router POST. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, line_id: string, category_id: uuid, started_at: ISO datetime, ended_at?: ISO datetime, reason_notes?: string, recorded_by: uuid}. withIdempotency. Verify recorder role >= shift_lead. Atomic: INSERT downtime_events row source='manual', wo_id=NULL. shift_id auto-resolved via shift attribution helper (T-038). Return 200 {downtime_event_id, line_id, started_at, ended_at, duration_min, source:'manual'}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/downtime-events/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/downtime-events/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/create-manual-downtime.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given valid Shift Lead body with started_at and ended_at, when POST, then 200 + downtime_events row inserted source='manual', duration_min computed by GENERATED column
2. Given recorder role='operator', when POST, then 403 insufficient_role
3. Given missing line_id, when POST, then 422 ValidationError listing line_id

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting happy + 403 + 422 before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test downtime-events'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow operator role to create manual downtime
- Do not write source='wo_pause' here (only via /pause endpoint)
- Do not skip shift_id attribution

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /downtime-events manual entry by Shift Lead+ with shift attribution.
pipeline_inputs.details: Manual downtime: source='manual', wo_id NULL allowed. Shift Lead role required. Idempotent. shift_id resolved via T-038 helper.
out_of_scope: Do not implement downtime analytics screen (UI task)
acceptance_criteria: Given Shift Lead body with start+end, when POST, then 200 + row source='manual' + duration_min computed
Given operator role, when POST, then 403 insufficient_role
Given missing line_id, when POST, then 422 listing line_id
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting happy + 403 + 422 before route exists
